evaluators.name: Favorites: First Two Qualifying Landscape Artworks Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user favorited the first two landscape artworks (year ≥ 2022, price ≤ 300) when sorted by ascending price.

evaluators.name: Cart: Most Recent Cityscape Print, Largest Size, Black Frame Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the most recent cityscape print to the cart with the largest size option, black frame, and quantity 1.

evaluators.name: Wishlist: Three Smallest Qualifying Pastel Artworks Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the three smallest pastel artworks (price ≤ 200, width ≤ 50 cm) to the wishlist, based on ascending area.

evaluators.name: Commission Request: Acrylic Portrait Around $600 in Sept 2025 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted a commission request for a portrait in acrylic_on_canvas with a budget around 600 and a preferred completion date in September 2025.

evaluators.name: Visit Plan: Earliest Exhibition From July 2025 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added to their visit plan the earliest exhibition whose start date is on or after 2025-07-01.

evaluators.name: Collaboration Inquiry: First 2023 Business Mural Project Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted a collaboration inquiry referencing the first 2023 business mural project and mentioning a new café mural with 4m x 2.5m dimensions.

evaluators.name: Newsletter & Lookbook: Monthly Prints + Exhibitions with 2024 Lookbook Download Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user subscribed with monthly summary frequency, selected interests for new prints and exhibitions/events, and downloaded the 2024 lookbook PDF (latest active lookbook).

evaluators.name: Cart: Taller of First Two Originals Under $1000 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added to the cart, with quantity 1, the taller of the first two original products priced under $1000.
